underlying_goal: Brainstorm and document game design ideas for an F1 party game platform (prix-guesser), maintaining living design documents and preparing artifacts for external research/audit
friction_detail: Claude prematurely dispatched a research subagent, framed brainstorming notes as locked-in requirements, overgeneralized BoxBoxd as non-social, and drafted an overly evaluative/closed audit spec requiring revision.
brief_summary: User wanted to brainstorm and structure F1 party game design ideas across living documents and prep an audit spec; Claude largely delivered with multiple file splits and revisions despite needing several course corrections on tone and assumptions.
